# Keith O'Brien

> Content strategist and founder of Total Emphasis, a B2B content strategy and ghostwriting firm. Also builds software, runs newsletters, and writes.

Keith O'Brien (also Keith R. O'Brien) is the founder and head consultant at Total Emphasis, where he creates and executes large content strategy projects and ghostwrites for executives across industries. Outside the business he builds software side-projects, runs several newsletters, and writes essays. keithrobrien.com is his personal hub; totalemphasis.com is the business.

## Work
- [Total Emphasis](https://www.totalemphasis.com): B2B content strategy and ghostwriting practice
- [Previously](https://keithrobrien.com/about): roles at tmrw life sciences, Haymarket Media, Horizon Media, and Attention USA

## Newsletters
- [141 Miles](https://www.141miles.com): a publication about the Jersey Shore
- [The Diffraction](https://www.thediffraction.com): a music publication
- [Survival Signal](https://survivalsignal.beehiiv.com): on being an independent worker (on hiatus)

## Profiles
- [GitHub](https://github.com/k-obrien17)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/keithobrien/)
- Email: keith@totalemphasis.com

## Site
- [Projects](https://keithrobrien.com/projects): software and side-projects
- [Writing](https://keithrobrien.com/writing): essays and notes
